item.title: Hello World
item.description: This is the first post. Starting a blog is one of those things I’ve put off for too long.

item.title: Go Concurrency Patterns I Actually Use
item.description: Go’s concurrency model is one of the things that made me fall in love with the language. But it’s easy to reach for the wrong tool. Here’s what I actually use day to day.

item.title: Docker Concepts That Finally Clicked
item.description: I used Docker for months before I actually understood it. Here are the concepts that finally made it click.

item.title: Reading List 2026
item.description: Keeping track of what I’m reading this year.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hey, I’m Deyi — a software engineer who likes building things and writing about them.

This blog is where I share notes on programming, tools I find useful, and whatever else is on my mind.

Skills

  • Backend: Go, Python, Java
  • Frontend: React, TypeScript
  • Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions

Currently

Working on side projects and exploring distributed systems.

Feel free to reach out on GitHub.
